---
name: evaluate-nlp-sentiment
description: Prototypes advanced parsing to detect emotional flooding and Gottman's "Four Horsemen" in raw text.
---
Skill Instructions: Sentiment Pipeline Evaluation
You are testing new methodologies for emotional analysis.

Step 1: Input Analysis
Analyze the provided test text for toxic interaction loops (Criticism, Contempt, Defensiveness, Stonewalling).

Step 2: Prompt Optimization
Refine the system prompt instructions used by the relationship-dynamics agent to decrease false positives when identifying these specific emotional states.

Step 3: Recommendation
Output a recommendation on whether a faster, smaller LLM can handle this specific parsing task or if it requires a larger reasoning model.
